heading: Tax on issuer of registration-required obligation not in registered form
label: 4701 Tax on issuer of registration-required obligation not in registered form
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (b)(1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘registration-required obligation’ has the same meaning as when used in section 163(f), except that such term shall not include any obligation required to be registered under section 149(a).”Pub. L. 111–1471986—Subsec. (b)(1). substituted “section 149(a)” for “section 103(j)”.Pub. L. 99–514

Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to obligations issued after the date which is 2 years after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 111–147section 502(f) of Pub. L. 111–147section 149 of this titleMar. 18, 2010

amendments: Amendments2010—Subsec. (b)(1). amended par. (1) generally. children.text: 1 percent of the principal amount of such obligation, multiplied by
the number of calendar years (or portions thereof) during the period beginning on the date of issuance of such obligation and ending on the date of maturity.

children.label: i
children.text: is required to be registered under section 149(a), or

children.label: i
children.text: there are arrangements reasonably designed to ensure that such obligation will be sold (or resold in connection with the original issue) only to a person who is not a United States person,

children.label: ii
children.text: interest on such obligation is payable only outside the United States and its possessions, and

children.label: iii
children.text: on the face of such obligation there is a statement that any United States person who holds such obligation will be subject to limitations under the United States income tax laws.

children.heading: Registered form
children.label: 2 Registered form
children.text: The term “registered form” has the same meaning as when used in section 163(f).
